title: Andhimantharai Lyrics Muran Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer(s) : Suchitra, Mega, Daya, Naveen Madhav
Song: Andhimantharai
Movie: Muran
Music Director : Sajan Madhav

Andhimantharai poo poo pookum neram
Ada innum enna thooram
Kollum manadhu koo koo koochal podum
ellaikalai meerum

Andhimantharai poo poo pookum neram
Innum innum enna thooram
Kollum manadhu koo koo koochal podum
ellai ellaikalai meerum

Ingum angum palakkangal meyum
Thaniye thoorathil nilavum kaayum
Etti nikkaadhe vendum vegam
Aasai theeraamal iravo alaindhu thaeyum thaeyum,
unmel paayum

Iraviltaan vaanavil naan -nee
thottal podhum sindhum enthan vannam
Pagal ingae thevayilai,
neelattum indha pozhu innum innum

Ila nenjil aasai oonjal
Idai velai indri aadum yogam konjam
Idi minnal puyalai pole
oru Nodiyil maarum nenjam

Iruttukendrum koochamillai naam sollvadhu
Acham vittu micham thottal uchcham nee selvadhu
(Andhimantharai ....)

Megam megamum urasikollum karrupu iravile
Dhegamum dhegamum urasi kondaal nerupu manadhile

Vattathukulle vaazhum vazhkai inbam illaye...
Kottai thaandum podhe sparisam eerkum unnaiye

Kanjathanam un idayilum udaiyilum naan kaanpadhu
Panjam mattum illai en azhagendru
Theenda theenda thilaikirathe...

Andhimantharai poo poo pookum neram
Ada innum enna thooram

ellaikalai meerum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Andhimantharai?

The song Andhimantharai conveys feelings of love and longing, beautifully expressed through its lyrics and melody.

What is the plot context of the movie Muran?

Muran revolves around complex relationships and the emotional struggles of its characters, making the song's romantic theme fitting.

Who are the singers of Andhimantharai?

The song features the voices of Daya, Megha, Naveen Madhav, and Suchitra.

Who composed the music for Andhimantharai?

The music for Andhimantharai was composed by Sajan Madhav.

When was Andhimantharai released?

The song was released on August 27, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Muran, the song Andhimantharai serves as a poignant expression of love and connection between the characters. Its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of romance and tranquility, making it a perfect backdrop for intimate moments. The collaboration of talented singers adds depth to the emotional landscape of the song. Overall, it beautifully encapsulates the essence of love, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Andhimantharai from Muran is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting voices of Daya, Megha, Naveen Madhav, and Suchitra, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with love. The collaboration of talented artists and the melodious composition by Sajan Madhav make it a must-listen for any romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: When the Andhimantharai flower blooms, what else can my heart do but sing?
When the Andhimantharai flower blooms, what else can my heart do but sing?
Here and there, the shadows are many. Alone, the moon shines brightly. Don't rush to stop it; without fulfilling desires, the night will come and shower blessings on you.
In the night, if I touch the rainbow, it is enough to feel my color. Here, there is no need for the day; this moment is still.
In the heart, the desire swings. The work of the heart dances without any reason. Like a lightning storm, it changes in an instant.
There is no fear in the darkness; we say it. Let go of fear, and you will rise high.
The clouds gather and embrace in the dark night. If the body and soul unite, there is fire in the heart.
Life within the circle has no joy... When the fortress is given, the touch will burn you.
I see you in my heart and in my body. It's not just wealth; it is my beauty that is not to be lost...
When the Andhimantharai flower blooms, what else can my heart do but sing?
Here and there, the shadows are many. Alone, the moon shines brightly. Don't rush to stop it; without fulfilling desires, the night will come and shower blessings on you.
(Andhimantharai ... Check Out Other Muran Song Lyrics)
